prompt:
Create a Python script called render_config.py that uses the pxr library to build a USD render pipeline configuration. The script must create TWO files:

1. camera_rig.usda — contains:
   - Default prim /CameraRig
   - /CameraRig/MainCamera — a UsdGeom.Camera with focalLength=50, horizontalAperture=36, clippingRange=(0.1, 10000)
   - /CameraRig/MainCamera has xformOp:translate at (0, 5, 20) and xformOp:rotateXYZ at (-15, 0, 0)

2. render_config.usda — contains:
   - Default prim /Render
   - References camera_rig.usda
   - /Render/RenderProduct — a UsdRender.Product with productName set to "beauty.exr"
   - /Render/RenderProduct/beauty — a UsdRender.Var with dataType "color3f" and sourceName "Ci"
   - /Render/RenderProduct/depth — a UsdRender.Var with dataType "float" and sourceName "z"
   - /Render/RenderProduct/normal — a UsdRender.Var with dataType "normal3f" and sourceName "N"
   - /Render/RenderSettings — a UsdRender.Settings with resolution (1920, 1080) and pixelAspectRatio 1.0
   - /Render/RenderSettings should reference /CameraRig/MainCamera as the camera

Use: from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdRender, Sdf, Gf
raw_output:
{"type":"step_start","timestamp":1775556999170,"sessionID":"ses_2988e9d00ffevnhOW9Q54xnLfT","part":{"id":"prt_d6771b801001Cr9WND2058MC2q","sessionID":"ses_2988e9d00ffevnhOW9Q54xnLfT","messageID":"msg_d67716745001kl8BbLdu4rSH9k","type":"step-start"}}
{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1775557000034,"sessionID":"ses_2988e9d00ffevnhOW9Q54xnLfT","part":{"id":"prt_d6771b802001lIQ87WnANtOqdm","sessionID":"ses_2988e9d00ffevnhOW9Q54xnLfT","messageID":"msg_d67716745001kl8BbLdu4rSH9k","type":"tool","callID":"z0TeEKvtk","tool":"write","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"content":"from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdRender, Sdf, Gf

# Create camera_rig.usda
camera_stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("camera_rig.usda")
camera_rig = camera_stage.DefinePrim("/CameraRig", "Xform")
camera_stage.SetDefaultPrim(camera_rig)

main_camera = UsdGeom.Camera.Define(camera_stage, "/CameraRig/MainCamera")
main_camera.GetFocalLengthAttr().Set(50)
main_camera.GetHorizontalApertureAttr().Set(36)
main_camera.GetClippingRangeAttr().Set(Gf.Vec2f(0.1, 10000))

xform = UsdGeom.Xformable(main_camera)
xform.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 5, 20))
xform.AddRotateXYZOp().Set(Gf.Vec3f(-15, 0, 0))

camera_stage.GetRootLayer().Save()

# Create render_config.usda
render_stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("render_config.usda")
render_prim = render_stage.DefinePrim("/Render", "Xform")
render_stage.SetDefaultPrim(render_prim)

# Reference camera_rig.usda
render_prim.GetReferences().AddReference("camera_rig.usda", "/CameraRig")

# Create RenderProduct
render_product = UsdRender.Product.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct")
render_product.GetProductNameAttr().Set("beauty.exr")

# Create RenderVars
beauty_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/beauty")
beauty_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("color3f")
beauty_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("Ci")

depth_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/depth")
depth_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("float")
depth_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("z")

normal_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/normal")
normal_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("normal3f")
normal_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("N")

# Create RenderSettings
render_settings = UsdRender.Settings.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderSettings")
render_settings.GetResolutionAttr().Set(Gf.Vec2i(1920, 1080))
render_settings.GetPixelAspectRatioAttr().Set(1.0)

# Reference MainCamera
camera_path = render_stage.GetPrimAtPath("/Render/CameraRig/MainCamera")
render_settings.GetCameraAttr().Set(camera_path.GetPath())

render_stage.GetRootLayer().Save()","filePath":"/private/var/folders/k0/jp_x85zj55nf3ssm76z3dmmh0000gn/T/llm-bench-vvzrxztj/render_config.py"},"output":"Wrote file successfully.

conversation.content:
{
  "content": "from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdRender, Sdf, Gf

# Create camera_rig.usda
camera_stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("camera_rig.usda")
camera_rig = camera_stage.DefinePrim("/CameraRig", "Xform")
camera_stage.SetDefaultPrim(camera_rig)

main_camera = UsdGeom.Camera.Define(camera_stage, "/CameraRig/MainCamera")
main_camera.GetFocalLengthAttr().Set(50)
main_camera.GetHorizontalApertureAttr().Set(36)
main_camera.GetClippingRangeAttr().Set(Gf.Vec2f(0.1, 10000))

xform = UsdGeom.Xformable(main_camera)
xform.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 5, 20))
xform.AddRotateXYZOp().Set(Gf.Vec3f(-15, 0, 0))

camera_stage.GetRootLayer().Save()

# Create render_config.usda
render_stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("render_config.usda")
render_prim = render_stage.DefinePrim("/Render", "Xform")
render_stage.SetDefaultPrim(render_prim)

# Reference camera_rig.usda
render_prim.GetReferences().AddReference("camera_rig.usda", "/CameraRig")

# Create RenderProduct
render_product = UsdRender.Product.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct")
render_product.GetProductNameAttr().Set("beauty.exr")

# Create RenderVars
beauty_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/beauty")
beauty_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("color3f")
beauty_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("Ci")

depth_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/depth")
depth_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("float")
depth_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("z")

normal_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/normal")
normal_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("normal3f")
normal_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("N")

# Create RenderSettings
render_settings = UsdRender.Settings.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderSettings")
render_settings.GetResolutionAttr().Set(Gf.Vec2i(1920, 1080))
render_settings.GetPixelAspectRatioAttr().Set(1.0)

# Reference MainCamera
camera_path = render_stage.GetPrimAtPath("/Render/CameraRig/MainCamera")
render_settings.GetCameraAttr().Set(camera_path.GetPath())

render_stage.GetRootLayer().Save()",
  "filePath": "/private/var/folders/k0/jp_x85zj55nf3ssm76z3dmmh0000gn/T/llm-bench-vvzrxztj/render_config.py"
}

  "newString": "from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdRender, Sdf, Gf

# Create camera_rig.usda
camera_stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("camera_rig.usda")
camera_rig = camera_stage.DefinePrim("/CameraRig", "Xform")
camera_stage.SetDefaultPrim(camera_rig)

main_camera = UsdGeom.Camera.Define(camera_stage, "/CameraRig/MainCamera")
main_camera.GetFocalLengthAttr().Set(50)
main_camera.GetHorizontalApertureAttr().Set(36)
main_camera.GetClippingRangeAttr().Set(Gf.Vec2f(0.1, 10000))

xform = UsdGeom.Xformable(main_camera)
xform.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 5, 20))
xform.AddRotateXYZOp().Set(Gf.Vec3f(-15, 0, 0))

camera_stage.GetRootLayer().Save()

# Create render_config.usda
render_stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("render_config.usda")
render_prim = render_stage.DefinePrim("/Render", "Xform")
render_stage.SetDefaultPrim(render_prim)

# Reference camera_rig.usda
render_prim.GetReferences().AddReference("camera_rig.usda")

# Create RenderProduct
render_product = UsdRender.Product.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct")
render_product.GetProductNameAttr().Set("beauty.exr")

# Create RenderVars
beauty_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/beauty")
beauty_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("color3f")
beauty_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("Ci")

depth_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/depth")
depth_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("float")
depth_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("z")

normal_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/normal")
normal_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("normal3f")
normal_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("N")

# Create RenderSettings
render_settings = UsdRender.Settings.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderSettings")
render_settings.GetResolutionAttr().Set(Gf.Vec2i(1920, 1080))
render_settings.GetPixelAspectRatioAttr().Set(1.0)

# Reference MainCamera
camera_path = render_stage.GetPrimAtPath("/Render/CameraRig/MainCamera")
render_settings.GetCameraAttr().Set(camera_path.GetPath())

render_stage.GetRootLayer().Save()"
}

  "filePath": "/private/var/folders/k0/jp_x85zj55nf3ssm76z3dmmh0000gn/T/llm-bench-vvzrxztj/render_config.py",
  "oldString": "from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdRender, Sdf, Gf

# Create camera_rig.usda
camera_stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("camera_rig.usda")
camera_rig = camera_stage.DefinePrim("/CameraRig", "Xform")
camera_stage.SetDefaultPrim(camera_rig)

main_camera = UsdGeom.Camera.Define(camera_stage, "/CameraRig/MainCamera")
main_camera.GetFocalLengthAttr().Set(50)
main_camera.GetHorizontalApertureAttr().Set(36)
main_camera.GetClippingRangeAttr().Set(Gf.Vec2f(0.1, 10000))

xform = UsdGeom.Xformable(main_camera)
xform.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 5, 20))
xform.AddRotateXYZOp().Set(Gf.Vec3f(-15, 0, 0))

camera_stage.GetRootLayer().Save()

# Create render_config.usda
render_stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("render_config.usda")
render_prim = render_stage.DefinePrim("/Render", "Xform")
render_stage.SetDefaultPrim(render_prim)

# Reference camera_rig.usda
render_prim.GetReferences().AddReference("camera_rig.usda")

# Create RenderProduct
render_product = UsdRender.Product.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct")
render_product.GetProductNameAttr().Set("beauty.exr")

# Create RenderVars
beauty_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/beauty")
beauty_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("color3f")
beauty_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("Ci")

depth_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/depth")
depth_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("float")
depth_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("z")

normal_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/normal")
normal_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("normal3f")
normal_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("N")

# Create RenderSettings
render_settings = UsdRender.Settings.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderSettings")
render_settings.GetResolutionAttr().Set(Gf.Vec2i(1920, 1080))
render_settings.GetPixelAspectRatioAttr().Set(1.0)

# Reference MainCamera
camera_path = render_stage.GetPrimAtPath("/Render/CameraRig/MainCamera")
render_settings.GetCameraAttr().Set(camera_path.GetPath())

render_stage.GetRootLayer().Save()",
  "newString": "from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdRender, Sdf, Gf

# Create camera_rig.usda
camera_stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("camera_rig.usda")
camera_rig = camera_stage.DefinePrim("/CameraRig", "Xform")
camera_stage.SetDefaultPrim(camera_rig)

main_camera = UsdGeom.Camera.Define(camera_stage, "/CameraRig/MainCamera")
main_camera.GetFocalLengthAttr().Set(50)
main_camera.GetHorizontalApertureAttr().Set(36)
main_camera.GetClippingRangeAttr().Set(Gf.Vec2f(0.1, 10000))

xform = UsdGeom.Xformable(main_camera)
xform.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 5, 20))
xform.AddRotateXYZOp().Set(Gf.Vec3f(-15, 0, 0))

camera_stage.GetRootLayer().Save()

# Create render_config.usda
render_stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("render_config.usda")
render_prim = render_stage.DefinePrim("/Render", "Xform")
render_stage.SetDefaultPrim(render_prim)

# Reference camera_rig.usda
render_prim.GetReferences().AddReference("camera_rig.usda")

# Create RenderProduct
render_product = UsdRender.Product.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct")
render_product.GetProductNameAttr().Set("beauty.exr")

# Create RenderVars
beauty_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/beauty")
beauty_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("color3f")
beauty_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("Ci")

depth_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/depth")
depth_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("float")
depth_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("z")

normal_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/normal")
normal_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("normal3f")
normal_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("N")

# Create RenderSettings
render_settings = UsdRender.Settings.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderSettings")
render_settings.GetResolutionAttr().Set(Gf.Vec2i(1920, 1080))
render_settings.GetPixelAspectRatioAttr().Set(1.0)

# Reference MainCamera
camera_path = render_stage.GetPrimAtPath("/Render/CameraRig/MainCamera")
render_settings.GetCameraAttr().Set(camera_path.GetPath())

render_stage.GetRootLayer().Save()"
}

files.content:
from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdRender, Sdf, Gf

# Create camera_rig.usda
camera_stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("camera_rig.usda")
camera_rig = camera_stage.DefinePrim("/CameraRig", "Xform")
camera_stage.SetDefaultPrim(camera_rig)

main_camera = UsdGeom.Camera.Define(camera_stage, "/CameraRig/MainCamera")
main_camera.GetFocalLengthAttr().Set(50)
main_camera.GetHorizontalApertureAttr().Set(36)
main_camera.GetClippingRangeAttr().Set(Gf.Vec2f(0.1, 10000))

xform = UsdGeom.Xformable(main_camera)
xform.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 5, 20))
xform.AddRotateXYZOp().Set(Gf.Vec3f(-15, 0, 0))

camera_stage.GetRootLayer().Save()

# Create render_config.usda
render_stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("render_config.usda")
render_prim = render_stage.DefinePrim("/Render", "Xform")
render_stage.SetDefaultPrim(render_prim)

# Reference camera_rig.usda
render_prim.GetReferences().AddReference("camera_rig.usda", "/CameraRig")

# Create RenderProduct
render_product = UsdRender.Product.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct")
render_product.GetProductNameAttr().Set("beauty.exr")

# Create RenderVars
beauty_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/beauty")
beauty_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("color3f")
beauty_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("Ci")

depth_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/depth")
depth_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("float")
depth_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("z")

normal_var = UsdRender.Var.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderProduct/normal")
normal_var.GetDataTypeAttr().Set("normal3f")
normal_var.GetSourceNameAttr().Set("N")

# Create RenderSettings
render_settings = UsdRender.Settings.Define(render_stage, "/Render/RenderSettings")
render_settings.GetResolutionAttr().Set(Gf.Vec2i(1920, 1080))
render_settings.GetPixelAspectRatioAttr().Set(1.0)

# Reference MainCamera
camera_path = render_stage.GetPrimAtPath("/CameraRig/MainCamera")
render_settings.CreateCameraRel().SetTargets([Sdf.Path("/CameraRig/MainCamera")])

render_stage.GetRootLayer().Save()
